summary: Complete testing of Project Centurion Phase 4 - Backend refactored with modular architecture. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend landing page, Founder DNA Quiz, auth modal, and protected routes all working correctly.

minor.issue: Projection sharing returns 404 - Supabase projection_runs table may not be created yet

backend: /api/ root endpoint returns version 3.0.0 and operational status
POST /api/engine/projection returns milestones and sensitivity analysis
POST /api/quiz/submit accepts answers and returns projection with benchmark comparison
GET /api/connectors/providers returns list of 4 supported providers (Razorpay, Stripe, Cashfree, Chargebee)
frontend: Landing page loads with animated hero section 'Know exactly when you'll reach ₹100 Crore'
Navbar displays with 100Cr Engine logo, Free Tools dropdown, Benchmarks, Pricing, Get Started
Hero section shows projection chart preview
Logo carousel displays partner logos (Razorpay, Stripe, Supabase, etc.)
Founder DNA Quiz displays with Question 1 of 5 indicator
Quiz shows all 5 revenue range options with emojis
Auth modal opens when clicking Get Started button
Auth modal shows email input with placeholder 'you@startup.com'
Auth modal shows 'Continue with Email' button
Auth modal mentions magic link authentication
Auth modal shows benefits list (Unlimited projections, Save projections, Track progress)
Protected route /dashboard redirects to home when unauthenticated
Auth modal automatically appears after accessing protected route

action_items: Create Supabase projection_runs table using /docs/supabase_schema.sql if projection sharing is required
critical_code_review_comments: Backend modular architecture well-structured with routers/, services/, models/ separation
Supabase service handles gracefully when tables don't exist (returns mock/empty data)
Rate limiting implemented with in-memory store, Redis-ready for production
Auth service properly verifies JWT tokens with Supabase
All protected endpoints correctly return 403 for unauthenticated requests
seed_data_creation: None required - used live API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 testing complete. Backend refactored with modular architecture is fully functional. All public endpoints working correctly. Auth endpoints properly require authentication. Supabase is connected but some tables (projection_runs) may not exist yet - the service handles this gracefully. Frontend has animated hero, Founder DNA Quiz with 5 questions, and auth modal with magic link support. Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users correctly.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No critical issues found during testing
